tickets.issue_description: The inverter is not turning on at all. I have checked the power supply and connections, but nothing works. The display shows no lights and there is no beep sound when I press the power button. This started happening after a power outage last week.

details.notes: Customer has confirmed that the inverter is completely non-functional. They have tried multiple power outlets and verified the power supply is working. The issue started after a power outage which suggests possible hardware damage. Escalating to supervisor for hardware decision.

After reviewing the customer's description and the support agent's notes, this appears to be a hardware failure possibly caused by power surge. We need to physically inspect the unit. Arranging reverse pickup so we can diagnose and repair the inverter at our service center.
